definition: Average quarterly standardized regional activity index in the state-year.
Average quarter-to-quarter change in the regional activity index.
Within-state percentile rank of quarterly activity, averaged over the year.
Average share of indicators deteriorating quarter over quarter.
Average actual-minus-predicted nowcast surprise; positive means stronger than expected.
Positive values mean the chosen model beat the benchmark in absolute error.
Average share of indicators available at the forecast origin.
